Case Study • Various

How we helped Skypass Travel Inc (Group) Ranks Among Global Top 5% — Secures EcoVadis Gold Medal with 95th Percentile Performance

The Challenge

Detailed inside.

Our Solution

Detailed inside.

The Results

Detailed inside.

Skypass Travel Inc (Group), a growing and dynamic travel solutions provider, has proudly achieved the Gold Medal (Feb 2025) from EcoVadis for its Group-level corporate sustainability performance. This significant milestone places Skypass among the top-performing companies globally assessed by EcoVadis—a recognition that is both prestigious and challenging to achieve, particularly within a network of over 150,000+ companies evaluated across more than 180+ countries and 220+ industry categories.

Receiving the Gold Medal at the Group level reflects years of sustained effort, strategic execution, and continuous improvement integrated across all subsidiaries and operational entities under the Skypass Travel Inc (Group) structure.

Measured Performance Across Sustainability Indicators.

  • 🌿 Environment: 78/100
  • 👥 Labor & Human Rights:   78/100
  • ⚖️ Ethics: 81/100
  • 🔗 Sustainable Procurement: 81/100

📊 Overall Score: 79/ 100
🏅 Global Percentile Ranking: 95th (Top 5% Worldwide)

These outstanding results underscore Skypass position as a sustainability-focused organization within the global travel and tourism sector. Achieving this level of recognition requires not only strong governance and compliance, but also a genuine culture of environmental responsibility, ethical business conduct, and continuous improvement aligned with the rigorous standards of EcoVadis.

🚀 A Sustainability Journey That Inspires Confidence and Pride

This milestone reflects a strong transformation at Skypass Travel Inc (Group), where sustainability has grown from an initiative into a core strength of the organization. In a changing global environment—marked by regulatory shifts, climate risks, and evolving stakeholder expectations—Skypass has responded proactively, turning challenges into opportunities for improvement. ESG principles are now integrated into daily decision-making, shaping governance, responsible procurement, environmental management, climate action, and ethical business practices.

The journey was not without its challenges. The Group navigated complex data consolidation across entities, evolving regulatory expectations, rigorous documentation requirements, and detailed evidence validation during the assessment process. Each challenge became an opportunity to strengthen internal systems, enhance cross-functional collaboration, and build greater transparency and accountability across operations.

Earning the Gold Medal from EcoVadis is more than recognition; it validates Skypass’s continued commitment to integrity, accountability, and improvement. It reinforces that sustainability is not just an initiative, but a central part of how the organization operates and grows

🤝 Strategic Collaboration with Growlity Inc

This milestone was made possible through the collaboration with Growlity Inc, which played a pivotal role in guiding Skypass through the comprehensive EcoVadis assessment process from framework alignment and data validation to performance enhancement and transparent reporting.

Leadership Perspectives

Message from Mr. Victor Abraham

“We are truly honoured to receive the EcoVadis Gold Medal — a recognition that reflects Skypass strong commitment to sustainability, responsible travel practices, and ethical business conduct. This achievement is the result of our collective vision to embed sustainability into our core operations and create long-term value for our customers and stakeholders. We sincerely appreciate the guidance and partnership of Growlity in helping us reach this important milestone with EcoVadis.”

CEO & President, Skypass Travel Inc (Group)

Message from Dr. Nitin Dumasia

“Earning the EcoVadis Gold Medal is an accomplishment achieved by only a select group of organizations worldwide. Skypass has demonstrated strong leadership commitment and structured sustainability practices, setting a positive benchmark within the travel industry. Growlity is proud to have been a trusted partner in supporting this journey toward global ESG excellence.”

President & CEO, Growlity Private Limited

About Skypass Travel Inc (Group)

Skypass Travel Inc (Group) is a global travel management and services company dedicated to delivering seamless, customer-focused travel solutions for corporate, leisure, and humanitarian travel needs. With expert consultants handling air travel, ground transportation, accommodation, and end-to-end trip coordination, the company helps organizations and travellers save time and optimize travel planning. By combining personalized service, global reach, and operational efficiency, Skypass continues to enhance travel experiences while building long-term value for customers, partners, and communities across the global travel ecosystem.

About Growlity Inc.

Growlity Inc., is a trusted ESG and sustainability advisory firm committed to enabling organizations to achieve tangible and credible sustainability performance. With strong capabilities in EcoVadis assessments, ESG strategy development, sustainability reporting, and climate action planning, Growlity supports businesses in transforming sustainability commitments into measurable results. The firm’s vision is to help organizations become resilient, transparent, and future-ready in an increasingly sustainability-driven global economy.
